title: Pioneer Generation Package
text:
Pioneer Generation Package - SupportGoWhere
Pioneer Generation Package
Share link
Special recognition to our Pioneer Generation through a package that assures them of affordable healthcare.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Provides our Pioneer Generation with a special package that ensures affordable healthcare
Benefits include life-long monthly cash assistance and healthcare subsidies
Collapse all sections
About this support

Provides the following benefits to support healthcare for Pioneers:



MediSave Top-Ups

	

Annual MediSave top-ups for life, ranging from $300 to $1,200 depending on birth cohort, to offset premiums for MediShield Life, ElderShield and CareShield Life. 

Additional MediSave top-ups of $50 to $200 will be disbursed from 2021 to 2025 for older Pioneers (i.e. those aged 82 and above in 2021) with serious pre-existing conditions who are paying additional premiums.




Additional Outpatient Care Subsidies 



	

Additional subsidies for outpatient care at polyclinics, public Specialist Outpatient Clinics and Community Health Assist Scheme clinics.




Special MediShield Life Premium Subsidies

	

Supports Pioneers in paying their MediShield Life premiums with special premium subsidies of up to 60%. 

Combined with the MediSave top-ups ($300 - $1,200), Pioneers born in 1934 or earlier will see their MediShield Life premiums fully covered, and Pioneers born from 1935 to 1949 will have about two-thirds of their MediShield Life premiums covered.




Pioneer Generation Disability Assistance Scheme 



	

Grants life-long cash assistance of $100 each month for those needing permanent assistance with at least 3 out of 6 of the following Activities of Daily Living:

Eating

Bathing

Dressing

Transferring

Toileting

Walking or moving around




[Incentives have ceased]
CareShield Life Additional Participation Incentives 

	

Provides participation incentives (totalling $3,000) to encourage Pioneers to join CareShield Life by 31 Dec 2024, in addition to any other premium subsidies seniors may receive.




If you would like more details on the above benefits as well as other useful information about this Package, please refer here.

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen

Born on or before 31 December 1949 and acquired citizenship on or before 31 December 1986

Eligible applicants have been notified in 2014

You may check your eligibility by:

Using the LifeSG app to view your Pioneer Generation e-card; or

Logging in to the Singpass mobile app to view your eligibility status

How to apply?

No application required

Eligible individuals will receive the benefits automatically

To apply for the Pioneer Generation Disability Assistance Scheme (PioneerDAS), visit this site for more information

Where can I find help?

View more details

For general enquiries on Pioneer Generation eligibility, MediSave top-up, and MediShield Life Subsidy: 1800-222-2888

For loss of Pioneer Generation Card, and other healthcare-related enquiries: 1800-650-6060

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 03 Oct 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
